steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the function of the underlined sentence. Read the sentence: it says the history ‘is preserved by the National Association of Black Journalists, which was founded…to support Black media professionals and honor people like Barnett.’ The ‘to’ clause directly states the founding purpose of the NABJ.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘It emphasizes the challenges that the National Association of Black Journalists has overcome.’: The sentence mentions no challenges or obstacles. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘It highlights several important members of the National Association of Black Journalists.’: No members are named or listed in the sentence. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘It lists the achievements of the National Association of Black Journalists.’: The sentence states a purpose, not a list of accomplishments. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘It summarizes the purpose of founding the National Association of Black Journalists.’: The ‘to support…and honor’ clause directly states why the NABJ was founded. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
